title: How to Apply andrej-karpathy-skills in Your Projects

sections.heading: Key Features
content_points: - Think Before Coding - explicit reasoning, no hidden assumptions
- Simplicity First - minimum code, no speculative abstractions
- Surgical Changes - touch only what you must

key_takeaways: Think Before Coding - explicit reasoning, no hidden assumptions
Simplicity First - minimum code, no speculative abstractions
Surgical Changes - touch only what you must
cta: Check out andrej-karpathy-skills at https://github.com/forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills and let us know what you build!
